target: 3. Will a Demon or a Snake Appear?
Where could Nezu-san be?
Nagumo-sensei said Nezu-san "might be nearby."
On the way from when Nagumo-sensei entered the forest to when she reached Haine…
She must have met Nezu-san somewhere along there. That means if we just head down the mountain—
…There he is!!
We found him! We're really close to the old clinic here!
Phew… That should be enough pit viper extermination for today.
(Please, my voice… reach him!!)
"Can you hear me!?"
"Please help!"
"Someone is going to be killed!"
Nezu-san, can you hear me!? Nezu-san!!
The animals are awfully restless today.
Nezu-san!! Ne-zu-saaaaan!!
Nezu-san!! Can you heeeear me?!
Well, I suppose it's about time to head home.
Damn it… No matter how loud I shout, he won't notice.
Nezu-san, please help!
Nezu-san!!
Hm, what's this?
Throwing trash even in a place like this. The mountain isn't a garbage dump.
Nezu-san, over here, over here! Look this way!
That girl I met earlier… Was she the Minakata family's daughter?
…Jeez, walking through the mountains completely defenseless. Don't come crying to me if you get bitten by a pit viper.
That Hizuru is in trouble! Hurry up and go help her!
Please! They're being attacked by a dangerous monster!
Nezu-san!!
It's no use, he can't hear us at all.
Nezu-san! Someone's going to be killed!
They're about to be killed by a monster right now!
(Nagumo-sensei and Ryunosuke both reacted strongly to the word "killed.")
(Maybe Nezu-san will too...!)
Nezu-san!
(It's no use… He can't hear me.)
At this rate, Hizuru and the others are going to be eaten by the monster!
Please! Help Hizuru and the others!
It's no good, he can't hear us at all…
(Nezu-san's belongings are a plastic bottle with pit vipers in it, a capture stick, and… a knife hanging at his waist.)
Ah!
What's with the sudden loud voice?
Nezu-san doesn't have a hunting rifle…
Huh? Oh, why!?
I see… Seasonally, it's still the closed hunting season.
There's no way he'd be carrying a hunting rifle around.
(There are two shadows approaching Nagumo-sensei and Ryunosuke…)
(Even without a hunting rifle, we need Nezu-san's help with his knife, no matter what…)
Shinpei, the shadows' presence is getting stronger!
Hizuru and Ryunosuke might have been found!
Damn it… Let's go back for now!
Aren't we taking Nezu-san with us?!
It's impossible since our voices aren't reaching him!
It might be difficult, but we have no choice but to somehow guide Nagumo-sensei and Ryunosuke here!
Got it!
Ugh…
Daena? Daena?
Onee-chan… what are those things?
I don't know…
Thank goodness…! It looks like they've been found, but they haven't been attacked yet!
*Sniff… sniff…*
(One of the two is focused on Nagumo-sensei and Ryunosuke, but…)
(The other's attention is on a mouse…)
(Maybe they can somehow manage to escape!)
Nagumo-sensei, can you hear me!?
Let's move from here! If you head down towards the east, the hunter Nezu-san is there!
…Ryunosuke, stay right here.
Huh… Can she not hear me?
Onee-chan… what are you going to do?
I'll try to find a way to drive them off.
It seems she really can't hear you! What do we do, Shinpei?!
(Is she so focused on the shadows that she's not paying attention to our voices?!)
Tekyara!!!
Hizuru, duck!!
Ona!?
(Yes! She ducked and dodged it!)
Hore!!
Hizuru, to the right!!
Ugh…!
Beh!?
What an idiot! It crashed right into the tree on its own!
(Nagumo-sensei is dodging everything…!)
(Is it a coincidence…? Or… is Ushio's voice actually reaching her?)
Uuu…!
Now's our chance! It's writhing around after crashing into the tree!
Alright then, I'll have a go at it too!!
…Huh?
It seems my attacks really don't hit.
Yeah… It looks like it's impossible for us to do anything about the shadows.
But Ushio's voice reached her just fine earlier, right?
Yeah, I felt like it did too.
We don't know what the trigger is. Let's keep calling out without giving up.
Oda… ouda…
This monster… is pretty ferocious. It's fast and troublesome.
(Nagumo-sensei is regaining her composure. Maybe my voice will reach her now!)
Nagumo-sensei, go east! Please run east!!
…Straw's voice?
If you head down east, the hunter Nezu-san is there!
East… direction? You're telling us to run east?
That's right! Please hurry and head east!
Onee-chan, I… I can go.
You look pale. Are you really okay?
I'd rather endure… the pain in my legs… than be attacked by that thing.
*Sniff, sniff sniff.*
That monster… might react to moving things.
Territorial instinct… or maybe hunting instinct.
Well, either is fine. If that's the case!
Huh…!? She dragged a pit viper out of the bushes—
And threw it at the shadow?!
Here, the perfect prey for you.
Byabya!!
(She's using the snake to distract the shadow and buy time!)
Keep playing with that pit viper. Let's go, Ryunosuke!
*Pant, pant*… Yeah!
Ryunosuke, can you still keep going?
*Wheeze, wheeze*… Y-Yeah…
(Ryunosuke looks like he's nearing his limit…)
Ushio, is the shadow chasing them?
Yeah, it's definitely getting closer.
Hizuru-san, go right! Nezu-san was a little further to the right!
…Right? This way!
(Nice. Ushio's voice is starting to reach her too!)
What was that sound just now…?
I can't see anything that looks like a shadow, but…
Ushio, can you tell what's going on?!
P-Pit viper…!
A pit viper?
That thing ate the pit viper from earlier! It turned into a snake and is chasing them!
It's here!
Is this it?!
Jeez… one thing after another!
Is that… a pit viper? Gross.
(Its shape is unnaturally distorted. It hasn't been able to copy it perfectly.)
Hssssss!!
Hizuru-san, dodge to the right!
Guh…!
This is bad…! At this rate, it'll get both of them at once!
Get down!!
(A flying stone hit the shadow?!)
What are you doing! It's dangerous to stray from the mountain path!
The hunter…
Nezu-san, he came!
Don't let your guard down! It's already recovered!
Hssssss!!
What's with this snake…! Looking all weird like that.
Be careful. That's no ordinary snake.
Huh? What do you mean?
Hssssss!!
Whoa!?
What's with these movements?!
Ryunosuke, step back and rest.
*Wheeze… wheeze…*
Ryunosuke-san… he's so weak he can barely even answer…
Ushio… we can't waste this great opportunity now that they've met up with Nezu-san.
If they shake off the shadow and escape to town, Haine, who hates being seen, should give up the chase.
Let's lend a hand too, and somehow get them to town!
Yeah, let's do this!
Hsss!
Dorya!!
Gii!?
It might look a bit different, but a snake is a snake.
Nice, Nezu-san! He managed to catch the shadow snake with his capture stick!
Now, what should I do with it. Can't exactly make pit viper liquor out of it.
Not yet! Please stab its shadow with your knife!
Hm, did you say something?
Shadow…?
Gi… Gigigigigi!
Wh-What the!? It's getting bigger and bigger?!
So this was its true form all along.
It's going to attack! Get away from it!
Giiiii!!
Guh…!
Wh-What, it vanished?!
It didn't vanish! It's hiding somewhere!
It'll attack again right away! Stay alert!
Guh… where is it?!
There! Above us! It's in the tree!
Be careful! It's attacking!
Guchora!
Whoa!?
Shuuu…
Tch! It almost took my head off.
I'll return the favor!
Babe!?
Take this…!
Gigi…!
Even getting slammed into a tree or hit with a stone doesn't do much to it?
It's true… even if the impact deforms its body, it goes back to normal after a while.
The shadow! You have to aim for the shadow!
Shadow? You said that earlier too…
Demerya!
Beh!?
Gigiiiiii!!
The monster that got hit in the shadow by a stone… is suffering?
The shadow is its weakness…!
That's right! Please attack the shadow stretching on the ground!
You just need to deal a fatal blow to its shadow!
I… I underst—
Tekyara!!
Crap…!
Nagumo-sensei?!
(She was caught off guard by the shadow and tripped on a tree root?!)
Hizuru-san! Hurry up and stand up!
Yachoro!
Like I'd let you! Take this!
Gugii!?
Now's your chance! Hurry up and stand!
Ah, thank you.
Giii!!
Here, have another!
Damn it. It's charging right at us, ignoring the stones I'm throwing!
The shadow! Attack the shadow!
It's useless no matter how much you attack the main body!
Then hurry up and do it!
But that monster is moving all over the place…
I see. If that's the case—
Hah! This should do the trick!
Nachora!?
Alright! Nezu-san has the shadow in a full nelson!
He does! Now it can't move!
Gugi… gigii!!
Hey, stop thrashing around!
Hizuru-san! Get the shadow while you can!
Yeah, I know!
Hunter, keep it pinned down! And—
I'm borrowing this!
Hey! What are you doing pulling out someone else's knife?!
This!
Wh-What does this mean? That monster just burst apart.
Its shadow was its weakness.
No, rather than a weakness, there's a possibility that the shadow itself is its main body…
I don't get it at all…
Anyway, you saved us. Thank you.
No need for thanks. I would've been in a bad spot myself without your advice.
More importantly… how did you know its weakness was its shadow?
Let's see… It was the result of grasping at straws.
Straws?
Heh…
(Nagumo-sensei…)
It seems it was a surprisingly reliable straw.
(Is it just my imagination? I feel like Nagumo-sensei and I just made eye contact…)
That's great, it looks like we were able to help Hizuru and Ryunosuke out.
Yeah, though we still can't let our guard down.
